rationale: The citing paper uses Campbell (2007) only in background discussion to support a general prior finding that perceived price fairness can reduce price sensitivity. It appears in grouped literature-review citations and is not given a distinct role in the paper's theorizing, hypotheses, design, or measures. The paper's core mechanism (identity incongruence -> sacrifice mindset -> lower price sensitivity) does not build directly on Campbell's specific source-of-price-information framework.
